'''Kikow''' was a pale [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who left his [[Ithorian Herdship|herdship]] at an early age and eventually settled on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. A superb cook with a highly developed sense of smell, he ran a restaurant and had a business trading in culinary herbs and spices. However, this was only a cover for his criminal undertakings. He had a small all-Ithorian organization, the [[Herd]], that [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. Kikow worked with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Furellas]], and modeled his organization on her larger one. He would never harm another Ithorian, but had no such compunctions about those not of his species. [https://web.archive.org/web/20090603072059/https://www.wizards.com/default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030130ralltiir5 He was killed by the Wookiee Furellas.]
